author: ec2-user
text: Implemented explicit terminal EDHOC role states, atomic candidate commits after full validation, one-shot OSCORE export with session-material clearing, exact CBOR type/shape checks, credential binding, immutable normalized connection-ID snapshots, collision-safe responder ID selection and initiator rejection, and responder transport cleanup through publication failures. Validation: full crypto 108 passed, full CoAP 242 passed; focused 56 passed; Ruff, EDHOC mypy, and git diff checks pass. Three independent final reviews found no in-scope P0-P2 issues. Broader RFC 9528 wire/profile migration remains tracked in 2auf.39.3; bounded responder resource sessions remain tracked in 2auf.39.2.
